Operation 'getPlayerLabels' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The original summary and description are identical and overly vague, providing no context about what labels are, their purpose, or what the response contains. The suggestion clarifies that this retrieves available label definitions, explains the domain context (labels are categorization tags), specifies the response format (array of label objects), and notes the authentication requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available player labels in Clash of Clans. Player labels are tags used to categorize and identify players within the game. This operation returns all label definitions that can be applied to player profiles. No authentication required for this read-only operation. Returns an array of label objects containing label identifiers and names.
data.reasoning: The original summary and description are identical and overly vague, providing no context about what labels are, their purpose, or what the response contains. The suggestion clarifies that this retrieves available label definitions, explains the domain context (labels are categorization tags), specifies the response format (array of label objects), and notes the authentication requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

Returns an array of label objects containing label identifiers and names.
